summary: Tested new features: 1) Login page with 'Forgot password' link and show/hide password, 2) Setup page redirects to login when app is configured (Step 3 SMTP config in UI verified), 3) Products page with sortable headers and DataTablePagination component, 4) Subscription email endpoint and email config UI, 5) Backend API for SMTP test connection. All tests passed (11/11 backend tests, frontend features verified).
passed_tests: Backend: Setup status returns correct structure (is_configured, has_database, has_superadmin, needs_mongo_config, needs_jwt_config)
Backend: Setup configure endpoint accepts SMTP fields in schema (smtp_host, smtp_port, smtp_user, smtp_password, etc.)
Backend: SMTP test connection endpoint exists and returns success/message
Backend: SMTP test with invalid server returns appropriate error
Backend: Subscription plans endpoint returns list of plans
Backend: Subscribe to plan triggers email notification (send_subscription_change_email)
Backend: Get my subscription returns current plan info
Backend: Email config endpoint requires authentication
Backend: Get email config returns SMTP configuration (for superadmin)
Backend: Forgot password endpoint accepts email and returns success
Backend: Verify reset token endpoint validates tokens correctly
Frontend: Login page renders with email/password inputs
Frontend: Login page has 'Olvidaste tu contraseña?' link
Frontend: Login page has show/hide password toggle button
Frontend: Setup page redirects to /login when app is already configured
Frontend: Products page has sortable headers (name, price, stock, suppliers)
Frontend: Products page has DataTablePagination component with page numbers
Frontend: Products page shows 'Mostrando X - Y de Z productos' info
Frontend: Sorting by column works (ascending/descending)
Frontend: Pagination navigation works (next/prev, page numbers)
Frontend: Email Config page (/email-config) has SMTP form fields
Frontend: Email Config page has 'Probar Conexión' button
Frontend: Subscriptions page shows 4 plans (Free, Starter, Professional, Enterprise)
Frontend: Subscriptions page shows current plan and subscribe buttons
critical_code_review_comments: Setup.jsx correctly includes Step 3 with SMTP configuration fields and test connection button
Products.jsx correctly uses SortableTableHead and DataTablePagination components
subscriptions.py subscribe_to_plan correctly imports and calls send_subscription_change_email
All data-testid attributes are present for interactive elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: SMTP email sending is implemented but requires real SMTP credentials to test actual delivery. The functionality is in place: 1) Setup page Step 3 allows SMTP configuration, 2) Email Config page (/email-config) allows superadmin to configure SMTP, 3) Subscription change triggers email via send_subscription_change_email. Products page uses DataTablePagination and SortableTableHead shared components.

setup_page.3_steps_progress: Verified in code - Configuración, SuperAdmin, Email
setup_page.step3_smtp_config: Verified - fields: smtp_host, smtp_port, smtp_user, smtp_password, smtp_use_tls/ssl

products_page.sortable_headers: Verified - name, price, stock, suppliers columns
products_page.pagination_info: Verified - 'Mostrando X - Y de Z productos'

mocked_api_note: SMTP email sending requires real SMTP server credentials. Email functionality is implemented but actual delivery cannot be tested without valid SMTP configuration.
